title: Rootless podman does not detect filesystems correctly
body:
### Issue Description

Podman doesn't correctly detect filesystem mounted at /home/user/.local/share/containers.

I have / mounted from ceph network filesystem and /home/user/.local/share/containers mounted from btrfs filesystem.
df output looks more like this
```
Filesystem         Type  Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
<<REMOVED>>        ceph  150G   67G   84G  45% /
/dev/nvme1n1       btrfs 111G   21G   74G  22% /home/user/.local/share/containers
```
podman drivers overlay and btrfs fail to detect that filesystem

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. use network filesystem as /
2. mount btrfs type filesystem in /home/user/.local/share/containers
3. select btrfs or overlay driver


### Describe the results you received

podman fails with overlayfs driver
```

Filesystem df
```
Filesystem     Type   Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/nvme1n1   btrfs  111G   21G   74G  22% /home/user/.local/share/containers
```

### Describe the results you expected

Podman should be able to detect filesystem type in /home/user/.local/share/containers

### podman info output

```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

The same version of podman works rootless without any issues on my other gentoo machine which is not netbooted. 


### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting
